summary: This is a recording of a Taraweeh prayer (nightly Ramadan prayers) and related community announcements at the Muslim Community Center of Tucson. The content consists primarily of the recitation of Quranic chapters during prayer, including extensive portions of Surah Al-Nisa (Chapter 4) and Surah Al-Maidah (Chapter 5), with traditional prayer takbirs (Allahu Akbar), surah recitations, and prostrations. The imam discusses these chapters and their revelation, noting that Surah Al-Maidah is a Madinan chapter considered among the last revealed. Brief community announcements are interspersed, including information about volunteer sign-ups, childcare facilities, and gymnasiums.
suggested_title: Taraweeh Prayer with Surah Al-Nisa and Al-Maidah Recitation - Muslim Community Center Tucson
catchy_title: Taraweeh Night: Straight Rows, Sacred Recitation
